creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
Upgrade to latest upstream release, compatible with Firefox 3 and with 
quite a few improvements.
It's a beta release, but in my experience seems to be stable enough.

PS: I didn't include XPI_FILES/XPI_DIR in the patch as the ones included 
in previous ports/114527 were stripped by sat@, I'm not sure when those 
are to be included and when not, but having written Makefile.xpi itself 
he certainly knows it better than me ;-)

Fix: PORTNAME=      firebug
-PORTVERSION=   1.05
-DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=     -fx+fl
+PORTVERSION=   1.2.0b6
+DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=     -fx
 CATEGORIES=    www

 MAINTAINER=    lapo@lapo.it
